title: Highly efficient multi component synthesis of xanthenes catalyzed by hydroxyapatite
author: P. Iniyavan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Centre for Organic and Medicinal Chemistry, School of Advanced Sciences, VIT University, 

 Vellore-632 014, Tamilnadu, India 

  E-mail  : kvpsvijayakumar@gmail.com 

 A new protocol was established to synthesis xanthenes using hydroxyapatite (phosphates) as a catalyst through multi component reaction of arylaldehydes and 1,3-dicarbonyls, which afforded high yield with purity. All the newly synthesized xanthenes were characterized using NMR, IR and Mass spectral data. The required hydroxyapatite catalyst was synthesized by co-precipitation method and characterized using XRD, SEM and E-DAX analysis.
